condition.expression: (not((Count = CAST('0' AS INT))) OR isnull((Count = CAST('0' AS INT))))

expression.expression: aggregate(_rules, `organization_name`, (acc, rule) -> regexp_replace(acc, concat('^', rule['variableKey'], '$'), rule['variableGroup']))
